name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade capability skills for AI coding agents. Five battle-tested skills: cloudflare-dns (migrate DNS from any registrar to Cloudflare with bulk record import and registrar nameserver flip), fly-to-aws-migration (end-to-end Fly.io → AWS migration playbook covering Postgres → Aurora, Machines → ECS Fargate, secrets, DNS cutover), deep-research (parallel multi-source research across X, Reddit, HackerNews, GitHub, Polymarket, YouTube, and Exa neural search), terminal-poster (dense retro-cyberpunk viral infographics via Nano Banana Pro), and ai-image-generation (best-in-class image generation routing). MIT licensed.
